patient_summary: Olivia (Patient ID 104), Female, age 73 (DOB primarily listed as 05/05/1952; conflicting DOB 07/21/1954 noted). Documented encounters include a 01/12/2021 refill request for Atorvastatin (The Heart Group Of LGHealth) and a 01/13/2021 telephone encounter by Torres, Lizza referencing a lipid-related refill and review of lipid panel (07/17/2020), BMP (01/11/2021), and LFTs (01/08/2021). Diagnosis listed: 'Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC)'. Additional health concerns list MRSA (R breast; dates 9/3/20–9/4/20; noted 03/29/2023) and COVID-19 with recovery dated 01/04/2021. Key lab abnormalities documented: GLUCOSE 199 (H) 01/11/2021; HDLCHOL 38 (L) 07/17/2020; AST 8 (L) 01/08/2021; GFR 50 (A) 01/11/2021. Functional limitations documented on 01/05/2021 include difficulty walking/climbing stairs, dressing/bathing, and doing errands alone. Multiple care team members and goal-directed plans (blood pressure and diabetes self-management) are recorded. Conflicting patient header data (DOB and phone) are preserved in conflicts.
